list.name: Game Domain
list.description: Core Wingspan game domain types — mutable game state, all 41 decision/choice classes, and the full card schema/parse pipeline.

list.name: Game Engine
list.description: The Wingspan game simulation engine — Engine orchestrator, all main-action transitions, bird power handlers, reactor dispatch, scoring.

list.name: ML Encoding & Model
list.description: PyTorch PolicyValueNet and SetupNet neural network definitions, the full state/choice float32 vector encoders with stripe layouts, and backward-compat shims.

list.name: RL Training Pipeline
list.description: End-to-end RL self-play training — TrainingLoop orchestrator, self-play collection, gradient updates, evaluation ladder, checkpoint management, FLIGHT PLAN TUI, and AWS cloud runner.

list.name: Application Layer
list.description: Top-level application shells — CLI play command, AI agents, player factory, tournament runner with Elo, instrumentation event system, model inspection reports.

list.name: Game Data
list.description: Static Wingspan card database files — master bird JSON, bonus cards, goals, rules.

list.name: Infrastructure & Config
list.description: Project build config, AWS ECS/ECR Terraform, Dockerfile, compat test fixtures, dev scripts.

list.name: Documentation
list.description: Developer workflow guide, user README, design decision records, quality gate spec.

document:README.md.name: README.md
document:README.md.summary: Main user and developer documentation covering game play CLI, training pipeline, tournament, and installed commands reference.

document:docs/PROJECT.md.name: PROJECT.md
document:docs/PROJECT.md.summary: Top-level package map linking to per-subpackage INDEX files.

file:src/wingspan/__main__.py.name: __main__.py
file:src/wingspan/__main__.py.summary: Unified CLI dispatcher routing 6 sub-commands (play, dashboard, tournament, inspect, cloud, monitor) via Python 3.12 match/case.

file:src/wingspan/state.py.name: state.py
file:src/wingspan/state.py.summary: Defines GameState and PlayerState — the complete mutable game state with all board slots, food tokens, eggs, birdfeeder, and turn-state scratch fields.

file:src/wingspan/cards/schema.py.name: schema.py
file:src/wingspan/cards/schema.py.summary: Defines all bird card, bonus card, and round goal domain types including the foundational EffectKind StrEnum and its 60+ variant taxonomy.

file:src/wingspan/decisions.py.name: decisions.py
file:src/wingspan/decisions.py.summary: Defines all 41 Choice subclasses and 6 Decision families covering every decision point in the game, plus the ALL_DECISION_CLASSES stable encoder ordering.

file:src/wingspan/engine/core.py.name: core.py
file:src/wingspan/engine/core.py.summary: Houses the Engine class that owns the full game lifecycle — setup, turn loop, ask() for validated agent interaction, and end-game scoring.

file:src/wingspan/engine/actions.py.name: actions.py
file:src/wingspan/engine/actions.py.summary: Implements all main-action game state transitions: play bird, gain food, lay eggs, draw cards, and end-of-round processing.

file:src/wingspan/engine/scoring.py.name: scoring.py
file:src/wingspan/engine/scoring.py.summary: Computes final game scores (round goals, bonus cards, eggs, cached food, tuck cards, bird points) and per-choice delta values for the RL encoder.

file:src/wingspan/engine/powers/grants.p.name: grants.py
file:src/wingspan/engine/powers/grants.p.summary: The largest power handler module, implementing grant effects triggered by bird activation.

file:src/wingspan/engine/reactors.py.name: reactors.py
file:src/wingspan/engine/reactors.py.summary: Orchestrates pink (between-turn) reactive bird powers by dispatching EffectKind events.

file:src/wingspan/encode/layout.py.name: layout.py
file:src/wingspan/encode/layout.py.summary: Defines EncodingSpec and the full vector dimension constants for the state, choice, trunk, and setup encoders.

file:src/wingspan/encode/state_encode.py.name: state_encode.py
file:src/wingspan/encode/state_encode.py.summary: Implements the full game-state-to-float32-vector encoder, converting all board positions, food, birdfeeder, hand, and bonus/goal progress into a fixed-size ML input.

file:src/wingspan/encode/choice_encode.p.name: choice_encode.py
file:src/wingspan/encode/choice_encode.p.summary: Implements the fixed-size float32 vector encoder for every Choice subtype.

file:src/wingspan/model/core.py.name: core.py
file:src/wingspan/model/core.py.summary: Implements PolicyValueNet — the PyTorch model that takes encoded game state and choice candidates to produce policy logits and value estimates.

file:src/wingspan/training/collect.py.name: collect.py
file:src/wingspan/training/collect.py.summary: Implements single-game self-play collection, recording agent decisions and outcomes into GameRecord objects for training.

file:src/wingspan/training/learner.py.name: learner.py
file:src/wingspan/training/learner.py.summary: Implements Learner — the gradient update step for the PolicyValueNet, computing policy and value losses.

file:src/wingspan/training/loop.py.name: loop.py
file:src/wingspan/training/loop.py.summary: Houses TrainingLoop — the central RL training orchestrator that sequences self-play collection, gradient updates, checkpointing, and evaluation.

file:src/wingspan/training/mp_collect.py.name: mp_collect.py
file:src/wingspan/training/mp_collect.py.summary: Implements ProcessCollector — multiprocess self-play collection using Python ProcessPoolExecutor with weight broadcasting and fp16 IPC compression.

file:src/wingspan/training/evaluate.py.name: evaluate.py
file:src/wingspan/training/evaluate.py.summary: Runs evaluation games between the current model and the opponent, computing win rate and score statistics.

file:src/wingspan/players/factory.py.name: factory.py
file:src/wingspan/players/factory.py.summary: Constructs player agents from PlayerSpec configurations — wiring model weights, policy functions, and setup handlers.

file:src/wingspan/agents/base.py.name: base.py
file:src/wingspan/agents/base.py.summary: Implements the random_agent — a uniform-random choice selector conforming to the Agent protocol.

file:src/wingspan/training/config.py.name: config.py
file:src/wingspan/training/config.py.summary: Defines TrainConfig — the master training configuration descriptor with ~70 fields covering network topology, collection, evaluation, and checkpointing.

file:src/wingspan/training/dashboard.py.name: dashboard.py
file:src/wingspan/training/dashboard.py.summary: Implements the FLIGHT PLAN live training dashboard — a full-screen Rich Live display showing convergence charts, system metrics, and configuration.

file:src/wingspan/tournament/app.py.name: app.py
file:src/wingspan/tournament/app.py.summary: Implements the top-level tournament runner — managing player selection, game scheduling, and the live Elo dashboard.

file:src/wingspan/cloud/runner.py.name: runner.py
file:src/wingspan/cloud/runner.py.summary: Implements HeadlessRunner — the main orchestration class for a cloud training session with S3 sync and signal handling.

document:docs/DECISIONS.md.name: DECISIONS.md
document:docs/DECISIONS.md.summary: Decision/choice taxonomy, ALL_DECISION_CLASSES ordering, choice-vector stripe layout, and engine call sites.

document:docs/TRAINING.md.name: TRAINING.md
document:docs/TRAINING.md.summary: Training program documentation — Phase 0-3 roadmap, hyperparameter guidance, eval ladder design, and convergence criteria.

document:docs/BIRDS.md.name: BIRDS.md
document:docs/BIRDS.md.summary: Comprehensive reference for all 180 birds and 26 bonus cards — EffectKind patterns, handler mappings.

file:src/wingspan/architecture.py.name: architecture.py
file:src/wingspan/architecture.py.summary: Defines ModelArchitecture — the single topology descriptor for the PolicyValueNet and the version-stamped ShapeKey.

file:src/wingspan/version.py.name: version.py
file:src/wingspan/version.py.summary: Defines MODEL_VERSION and the versioning contract (FRESH vs REGIME changes), exposing the version string and compat shim routing.

file:src/wingspan/instrumentation/dispat.name: dispatcher.py
file:src/wingspan/instrumentation/dispat.summary: Implements Instrumentation — the event dispatcher routing game lifecycle events to handlers.

config:pyproject.toml.name: pyproject.toml
config:pyproject.toml.summary: Package build configuration with strict Pyright, black, isort, coverage settings, and the wingspan CLI entry point.

service:Dockerfile.name: Dockerfile
service:Dockerfile.summary: Single-stage Amazon Linux 2023 container for wingspan.cloud headless training.

resource:deploy/main.tf.name: main.tf
resource:deploy/main.tf.summary: Terraform root module for AWS ECS/ECR infrastructure.

config:src/wingspan/data/master.json.name: master.json
config:src/wingspan/data/master.json.summary: Master bird card database — 180+ bird records.

document:docs/VERSIONING.md.name: VERSIONING.md
document:docs/VERSIONING.md.summary: Artifact version changelog and FRESH/REGIME distinction.
